ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Continued To Apr-15-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Gross for Robert Sullivan.

The Court raised the issue the Administrator paying himself $6,400.00 without a Court order. Mr. Gross referred to the accounting order that was issued by the Court in April of 2019, stated that the $6,400.00 was for Mr. Sullivan's one-half share of the interest that was accrued, spoke of the tax audit period and stated that he will speak with the CPA regarding a tax clearance letter. Mr. Gross also raised the issue of the bond being outstanding, stated that it was based on an amount of $1,500,000.00 and that there is only $17,000.00 in the estate. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to file a petition to address the bond. Status on distribution of the reserve is continued to April 15, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Gross is to file a status report one week before the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Gross for Robert Sullivan (Administrator).

The Court noted that the time sheets do not differentiate between extraordinary and statutory services, but that the extraordinary fees were reduced and questions why the reserve is so high. Mr. Gross stated that the house sold during administration, that there was a significant gain of $300,000.00 plus, that most of the Beneficiaries live in Mexico and that they have to recalculate what amount of taxes are due. The Court granted the Petition for Final Distribution, etc. (subject to review of the order). Status on distribution of the reserve is set for June 24, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Continued To Nov-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Gross for Robert Sullivan.

Mr. Gross stated that the petition is prepared, that the accounting is complete, that it has been sent to his Client for review/signature, that he has not heard back from his Client and requested 30-days to finalize the paper work. Status on close of the estate is continued to November 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel was advised that he must file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by November 1, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (159 Granada Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross for petitioner Robert Sullivan.

The cause comes on for sale of a 100% interest in the real property located at 159 Granada Avenue, San Francisco, California. The opening bid is $1,320,000.00. There are no overbidders. Mr. Gross stated that the initial bond was in the amount of $10,000, and acknowledged that additional bond in the sum of $1,310,000 was needed. The sale was confirmed at $1,320,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property, subject to review of the order. An additional bond in the amount of $1,310,000 was required.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

Petition To Approve Exclusive Listing Agreement For Sale Of Real Estate
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Gross for Petitioner.

Mr. Gross stated that he has not heard a word as to anyone opposing, that Nick Hernandez moved out, that Ricardo Hernandez agreed to move out by October 30th and recognizes that it is in the best interest of the sell estate to sell the house. The Court granted the Petition to Approve Exclusive Listing Agreement for Sale of Real Estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
